narrative:
Cols 73-L (precinct in Franklin County) has 963 registered voters, with 58.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.2%, a modest Republican lean of 3.1 percentage points.
